Cookie Policy

Last Updated: April 10, 2026

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your browser by websites to remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

How We Use Cookies

This site only uses essential functional cookies to save your language preference settings (Simplified Chinese / Traditional Chinese / English). We do not use any advertising cookies, analytics cookies, or third-party tracking cookies.

Cookie Types

Language Preference Cookie: Stores your chosen display language so that your preferred language is automatically used on your next visit. This cookie does not contain any personal information.

Managing Cookies

You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may prevent your language preference from being saved, but it will not affect the normal functioning of the test.

Third-Party Cookies

This site is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Cloudflare may set necessary security cookies (such as __cflb, etc.) for load balancing and security protection. These cookies are part of Cloudflare's services and are beyond our control.

Policy Updates

We may update this cookie policy to reflect changes in our practices. Any changes will be posted on this page.
